fields.summary: Creates a new typeface based on this typeface with the specified font arguments.

params.args: The font arguments specifying variation position, palette index, and palette overrides.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> with the specified font arguments applied.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface based on this typeface using the specified color palette index.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette to use.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> with the specified palette applied.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface based on this typeface at the specified variation design position.

params.position: The variation axis-value pairs specifying the desired design position.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> at the specified variation design position.

fields.summary: Gets a shared empty typeface that matches no glyphs.
fields.value: A shared <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> that contains no glyphs.

fields.summary: Retrieves information about the variation axes supported by this typeface into a provided span.

params.axes: When this method returns, contains the axis information written to the span. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.

fields.returns: The number of variation axes written to <paramref name="axes" />.

fields.summary: Retrieves the current variation design position coordinates of this typeface into a provided span.

params.coordinates: When this method returns, contains the axis-value pairs written to the span. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.

fields.returns: The number of coordinates written to <paramref name="coordinates" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this typeface contains no glyphs.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the typeface contains no glyphs; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes supported by this typeface.
Gets an array of information about the variation axes supported by this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> values describing each supported variation axis.

fields.summary: Gets an array of the current variation design position coordinates for this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values representing the current design position.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation design position coordinates for this typeface.
fields.value: The number of axis-value coordinates in the current design position.
